enemies.name: Goblin Hexer

traits.name: Nimble Escape
traits.description: Can Disengage or Hide as Bonus Action.

actions.name: Dagger
actions.description: Melee or Ranged Attack Roll: +4, reach 5 ft. or range 20/60 ft. Hit: 4 (1d4+2) Piercing damage.

actions.name: Hex Bolt
actions.description: Ranged Spell Attack: +5, range 90 ft. Hit: 10 (2d6+3) Necrotic damage.

actions.name: Vexing Hex (Recharge 5-6)
actions.description: One creature within 60 ft: DC 13 WIS or Cursed for 1 minute. While Cursed, disadvantage on attacks and ability checks. Save ends.

enemies.notes: Leather Armor. Spellcasting (DC 13, +5): Cantrips: minor illusion, poison spray. 1st (4 slots): charm person, hex. 2nd (2 slots): blindness/deafness, hold person.
